zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Sharpe於1598年11月17日出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾時，她的父親John Sharp III25歲，母親Agnes Wilson25歲。她於1619年6月4日與Robert Morrison在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1680年3月5日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Sharpe于1598年11月17日出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾时，她的父亲John Sharp III25岁，母亲Agnes Wilson25岁。她于1619年6月4日与Robert Morrison在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1680年3月5日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Sharpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sharp
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sharp(e) ‘sharp, quick, smart, acute, keen-witted’ (Old English scearp).
Irish: when not the English or Scots name in 1 above, an Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Géaráin ‘descendant of Géarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of géar ‘sharp’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Scharf   ‘sharp-cutting’ or of any of several other European names with similar meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Sharpe was born on 17 November 1598, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, her father, John Sharp III, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Wilson, was 25. She married Robert Morrison on 4 June 1619, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 March 1680, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Sharpe est née le 17 novembre 1598, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, John Sharp III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wilson, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Morrison le 4 juin 1619, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mars 1680, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Sharpe am 17. November 1598 in Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Sharp III 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Wilson 25. Sie hat am 4. Juni 1619 in Ayrshire, Scotland Robert Morrison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. März 1680 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Sharpe è nata il il 17 novembre 1598 nel Clackmannanshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Sharp III, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes Wilson, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert Morrison il 4 giugno 1619, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 marzo 1680, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Sharpeが1598年11月17日にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Sharp IIIは25歳，母Agnes Wilsonは25歳であった。1619年6月4日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでRobert Morrisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1680年3月5日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで81歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Sharpe(이)가 1598년 11월 17일 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sharp III(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Wilson(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1619년 6월 4일 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Robert Morrison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1680년 3월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에 묻혔다.

pt.17 November 1598–5 March 1680: 17 de novembro de 1598–5 de março de 1680
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Sharpe nasceu em 17 de novembro de 1598, em Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Sharp III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wilson, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Morrison em 4 de junho de 1619, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de março de 1680, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Sharpe родилась 17 ноября 1598 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Sharp III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wilson, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Morrison 4 июня 1619 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 марта 1680 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.17 November 1598–5 March 1680: 17 de noviembre de 1598–5 de marzo de 1680
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Sharpe nació el 17 de noviembre de 1598, en Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, John Sharp III, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Wilson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Robert Morrison el 4 de junio de 1619, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1680, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
